title: C/C++ mapper for mini map
goal: mini map can map .c/.h/.cpp/.hpp (and .cc/.hh) files - a new cppMapper.ts extracts functions, structs, classes, enums, typedefs and #include imports with line anchors, registered in buildGraph.ts and covered by tests following the pattern of the other mappers.

steps.title: cppMapper.ts core extraction
steps.detail: New src/graph/cppMapper.ts exporting mapCppFile(content, relPath): FileGraph - extracts #include imports (local "..." vs system <...>), free functions with signatures, classes/structs with public methods, enums and typedef/using aliases, each with 1-based line/endLine anchors; comments and preprocessor noise stripped before matching; works for header declarations and source definitions (.h treated as the same cpp language as .c/.cpp).

steps.title: Register C/C++ in buildGraph and map
steps.detail: detectLanguage in buildGraph.ts recognizes .c/.h/.cpp/.hpp/.cc/.hh -> cpp; the language switch dispatches to mapCppFile; hasMappableProject gains a CMakeLists.txt root marker and collectMappableFiles the new extensions; the no-mappable-files message in src/commands/map.ts and its doc comment list the new extensions.

steps.title: Unit tests cppMapper.test.ts
steps.detail: Tests following the pattern of the other mapper tests - fixtures covering includes (local vs system), free functions, a class with public/private methods, a struct, an enum, typedef/using, multi-line declarations, and correct line anchors; existing buildGraph.test.ts stays green.

steps.title: Docs + green run
steps.detail: docs/non-interactive/map.md language list mentions C/C++ (and README if it lists languages anywhere); npm test and typecheck pass.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 153: C/C++ mapper for mini map
